subcodes.first_line: We desire to give unto him who is named Elias to drink of the sealed wine in My Name, the Self-Subsisting, and show unto him that which he hath sought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نرید ان نسقی من سمی بالیاس الرحیق المختوم باسمی القیوم و نریه ما سئله
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Moses, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
